title: Inheritance Tax: thresholds
body: "The Inheritance Tax nil-rate band, residence nil-rate band and residence nil-rate band taper will be fixed at their current levels for the tax years up to and including 2030 to 2031.  The combined £1 million allowance for 100% Agricultural Property Relief and Business Property Relief will be fixed for the tax years up to and including 2030 to 2031. "
